class.name: GaussianSplatManager
class.brief_description: Singleton manager coordinating module-wide Gaussian splatting state.
class.description: GaussianSplatManager centralizes shared resources and runtime settings for the module, including GPU resource lifecycle, performance telemetry, sorting configuration, and cross-node coordination points used by GaussianSplatRenderer instances. Access via [code]GaussianSplatManager.get_singleton()[/code] in C++ or the engine singleton in GDScript.

method.name: get_global_stats
method.description: Returns a dictionary containing module-wide performance statistics. Keys include [code]"total_gaussians"[/code] (total active splat count across all registered buffers) and [code]"total_memory_usage"[/code] (GPU memory in bytes).

method.name: set_gpu_sorting_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables GPU-based depth sorting. When disabled, the module falls back to CPU sorting which may reduce performance for large datasets.

method.name: is_gpu_sorting_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if GPU-based depth sorting is enabled.

method.name: set_shared_submission_device_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables the shared RenderingDevice used for multi-threaded GPU submission. When enabled, multiple renderer instances can queue work asynchronously through a shared compute queue.

method.name: is_shared_submission_device_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the shared submission device is enabled for multi-threaded GPU work.

method.name: get_sorting_config
method.description: Returns a dictionary of sorting algorithm configuration thresholds. Keys include [code]"bitonic_max"[/code], [code]"radix_max"[/code], [code]"onesweep_max"[/code], [code]"hybrid_trigger"[/code], [code]"hybrid_batch"[/code], and other sorting heuristic parameters driven by project settings.

members.member: Controls whether GPU-accelerated depth sorting is used. Disabling this falls back to CPU sorting.
Controls whether a shared RenderingDevice is created for multi-threaded GPU submission across renderer instances.
